query: UPDATE agent_activity_logs SET status = 'completed', result_summary = CONCAT(COALESCE(result_summary, ''), ' (狀態已自動修正)'), completed_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'started' AND started_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE);
